summary: Iteration 148: Verified new Paddy Purchase Register (PPR) subtab and subtab styling fix. All 13 test cases passed. PPR component loads with data, filters work correctly, export buttons present, TOTAL row displays. Subtabs use consistent Button component styling matching main tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: PaddyPurchaseRegister.jsx: Well-structured component with independent filters (date_from, date_to, rst_no, tp_no, truck_no, agent_name, mandi_name)
App.js lines 2231-2241: PPR subtab uses same Button component styling as other subtabs - consistent font size and styling
Export endpoints /api/export/pdf and /api/export/excel accept date_from, date_to, rst_no, tp_no filters correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (PDF/Excel export APIs working with new filter params)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 148 verified the new Paddy Purchase Register subtab feature. The PPR component has data-testid='paddy-purchase-register' and subtab has data-testid='subtab-purchase-register'. All 7 filter fields work (date_from, date_to, rst_no, tp_no, truck_no, agent_name, mandi_name). Clear filter button appears when filters are active. WhatsApp/Telegram send buttons exist but require API keys to test actual sending.

features_tested.ppr_clear_filter: PASS - Clear button appeared and worked correctly
